title: becium obovatum var. knyanum
intro: Becium obovatum var. knyanum, also known as East African bush basil, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, native to East Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of using Becium obovatum var. knyanum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in wound healing, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
